inputs.label: Mean of Differences
inputs.businessContext: The average of the differences between the paired observations.

businessContext_i18n.en: The average of the differences between the paired observations.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Durchschnitt der Differenzen zwischen den gepaarten Beobachtungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La moyenne des différences entre les observations appariées.
businessContext_i18n.es: El promedio de las diferencias entre las observaciones pareadas.

inputs.label: Standard Deviation of Differences
inputs.businessContext: The standard deviation of the differences between the paired observations.

businessContext_i18n.en: The standard deviation of the differences between the paired observations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eşleştirilmiş gözlemler arasındaki farkların standart sapması.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Standardabweichung der Differenzen zwischen den gepaarten Beobachtungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: L'écart-type des différences entre les observations appariées.
businessContext_i18n.es: La desviación estándar de las diferencias entre las observaciones pareadas.

inputs.label: Sample Size (Number of Pairs)
inputs.businessContext: The number of paired observations in the sample.

label_i18n.es: Tamaño de la muestra (número de pares)

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of paired observations in the sample.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl der gepaarten Beobachtungen in der Stichprobe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le nombre d'observations appariées dans l'échantillon.
businessContext_i18n.es: El número de observaciones pareadas en la muestra.

inputs.label: Hypothesized Difference (μ₀)
inputs.businessContext: The hypothesized mean difference under the null hypothesis (commonly 0).

businessContext_i18n.en: The hypothesized mean difference under the null hypothesis (commonly 0).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıfır hipotezi altında hipotez edilen ortalama fark (genellikle 0).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die hypothetische mittlere Differenz unter der Nullhypothese (üblicherweise 0).
businessContext_i18n.fr: La différence moyenne hypothétique sous l'hypothèse nulle (généralement 0).
businessContext_i18n.es: La diferencia media hipotética bajo la hipótesis nula (comúnmente 0).
